summary: Hardened reduced-motion support across the app: (1) intro-sequence.css now sets `transition: none`, `opacity: 1`, and `transform: none` for `.intro-line` under prefers-reduced-motion, and `transition: none` for `.intro-overlay`; (2) intro-sequence.ts reduces the hold delay from 900ms to 50ms and skips fade-out entirely when reduced motion is active; (3) button.css adds an explicit `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` block setting `transition: none` on `.btn`.
